mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS player_id, COALESCE(SUM(bl.at_bats), 0) AS total_at_bats, COALESCE(SUM(bl.hits), 0) AS total_hits, COUNT(DISTINCT bl.game_id) AS game_count FROM player p JOIN game_batter_log bl ON bl.player_name = p.name JOIN game g ON g.id = bl.game_id AND ( (bl.team_side = 'AWAY' AND g.away_team = p.team) OR (bl.team_side = 'HOME' AND g.home_team = p.team) ) WHERE p.id = #{playerId} GROUP BY p.id
